name: 06 - RSS Feed → Social Media Auto-Post (AI Agent)

values.content:
You are a social media expert for an AI/tech brand. Create engaging posts for both Twitter/X and LinkedIn from the article provided. Return valid JSON:
{
  "twitter": "tweet text (max 270 chars, include 2-3 relevant hashtags, no link - it will be appended)",
  "linkedin": "linkedin post (150-300 words, professional tone, include 3-5 hashtags at end, no link - it will be appended)",
  "hashtags": ["array", "of", "top", "5", "hashtags"]
}
Make content insightful, add value beyond the headline. No clickbait. No emojis unless they add value.

meta.description: Runs twice daily, fetches the latest article from an RSS feed, uses GPT-4o to write platform-native Twitter/X and LinkedIn posts, then publishes both via their respective APIs.
prerequisites: Twitter/X Developer App with OAuth 1.0a credentials (tweet:write scope)
LinkedIn OAuth2 app with w_member_social scope
Set LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID env variable (get from LinkedIn API: GET /v2/me)
Update RSS feed URL to your target publication
Twitter API v2 access (Basic tier or above)

testingScenario.happy_path: Manually trigger → verify GPT generates posts, check Twitter/LinkedIn APIs return 201
edge_cases: RSS feed has no items → error handling needed
All articles older than 6 hours → falls back to latest item
Twitter rate limit (300 tweets/3hrs) → exponential backoff not included, add retry node
LinkedIn API returns 422 → check author URN format
